arts.ttl: David Squires on … a big week in Europe for the Premier League quintet
arts.sum: Our cartoonist looks ahead to crunch ties in the Champions League, Europa League and Conference League Buy copies of David’s cartoons in our Print Shop And get David’s new book, Chaos in the Box, now Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Bayern Munich open talks for Jonathan David
arts.sum: Arsenal and Bayern Munich have opened talks with the entourage of Jonathan David over a potential summer free transfer. If true, it will cost €34m over the first year alone for Arsenal or Bayern Munich to sign David this summer.

arts.ttl: David Turnbull post Celtic move turns sour as midfielder faces ultimate Cardiff City nightmare
arts.sum: The midfielder has endured a difficult 18 month spell in the English Championship

arts.ttl: Former Tottenham player who Mauricio Pochettino gave his Champions League debut just scored on his Baller League debut
arts.sum: A former Tottenham Hotspur striker who Mauricio Pochettino handed his Champions League back in 2017 has seen his football career take a rather dramatic twist....
